model_family_fit_comparison.compatibility_note: Native artifacts expose 12 channel-aggregate counts, so each channel is treated as one pseudo-cell before calling pseudo_voxel_forward_model.
Native artifacts expose 12 channel-aggregate counts, so each channel is treated as one pseudo-cell before calling pseudo_voxel_forward_model.

sigma22.measurement_degradation: Independent binomial thinning is applied after 12-channel to 4-pseudo-voxel pooling for both localizer and feedback responses.

quantization.unit: retained V1_E spike counts per pooled pseudo-voxel

test.unexpected_partitioning: Unexpected trials are partitioned into 24-trial subsets per seed and subset accuracies are averaged.

native_forward_model_wrapper: Uses 12 native channel aggregates as pseudo-cells because native JSON artifacts do not contain per-cell V1_E spike counts.
